title: Ecommerce Microservices Platform
description: Microservices-based e-commerce backend using Spring Boot, layered architecture (controller/service/repository/entity), and H2 for local development.

title: Spring Boot GraphQL API
description: GraphQL API built with Spring Boot (GraphQL endpoint + queries). Good starter project to demonstrate schema design and resolvers.

title: Deploy Web Application
description: Deployment-focused project showing Git workflows and pushing code to GitHub (useful as a reference for CI/CD learning).

title: Portfolio Website
description: Personal portfolio website (HTML/CSS/JS) published using GitHub Pages.
